description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced yard, featuring a flat roof and a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes. The main building is complemented by a detached garage and a variety of outdoor amenities, including a swimming pool, patio seating, a swing set, and landscaped trees and shrubs. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor living spaces. The property includes paved walkways, a driveway leading to the garage, and a backyard area with recreational features such as a trampoline and a treehouse. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear zones for relaxation, play, and vehicle storage. The architectural style emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a harmonious blend with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped outdoor spaces including a pool, patio, and play areas. The property is enclosed by a fence and features a mix of white and wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio seating, trampoline, and treehouse, with the main house and garage in the background.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the connection between the main house and garage, as well as the open backyard and recreational features.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the driveway entrance, garage, and the arrangement of outdoor amenities in the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
